traits.name: Celestial Resistance
traits.desc: You have resistance to necrotic and radiant damage.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Healing Hands
traits.desc: As a Magic action, you touch a creature and roll a number of d6s equal to your Proficiency Bonus. The creature regains HP equal to the total. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Light Bearer
traits.desc: You know the Light cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.

traits.name: Celestial Revelation
traits.desc: When you reach level 3, choose one of the following forms: Heavenly Wings (sprout spectral wings, gain Fly speed equal to your Speed for 1 minute), Inner Radiance (shed 10-foot bright light, deal extra radiant damage equal to Proficiency Bonus on one attack per turn), or Necrotic Shroud (frighten nearby enemies and deal extra necrotic damage). Usable once per Long Rest.

traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.desc: You have draconic ancestry. Choose a dragon type, which determines your Breath Weapon damage type and Damage Resistance.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.desc: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with a Breath Weapon. The area and damage type depend on your Draconic Ancestry. The damage is 1d10 per Proficiency Bonus. Creatures in the area make a DEX or CON saving throw (DC = 8 + CON modifier + Proficiency Bonus). Usable a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus per Long Rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.desc: You have resistance to the damage type associated with your Draconic Ancestry.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Draconic Flight
traits.desc: When you reach level 5, you sprout draconic wings. As a Bonus Action, you can cause the wings to appear and gain a Fly speed equal to your Speed. The wings last until you dismiss them (no action required). You can't use this trait while wearing armor unless the armor is made to accommodate the wings.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: You can see in dim light within 120 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.desc: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and resistance against poison damage.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.desc: Your hit point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 again whenever you gain a level.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.desc: As a Bonus Action, you gain Tremorsense out to 60 feet for 10 minutes. You must be on a stone surface or touching such a surface to use this trait. Usable a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus per Long Rest.

traits.name: Dwarven Fortitude
traits.desc: Whenever you take the Dodge action in combat, you can spend one Hit Die to heal yourself. Roll the die, add your Constitution modifier, and regain that many HP.

traits.name: Dwarven Armor Training
traits.desc: You have proficiency with light and medium armor.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.desc: You have advantage on saving throws against the Charmed condition, and magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.desc: You gain proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Trance
traits.desc: You don't need to sleep. Instead, you meditate deeply for 4 hours a day (your long rest). After meditating, you gain the same benefit that a human does from 8 hours of sleep. While meditating, you can dream after a fashion; such dreams are actually mental exercises practiced over years.

traits.name: Cantrip
traits.desc: You know one cantrip of your choice from the Wizard spell list. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for it.

traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
traits.desc: You have proficiency with longswords, shortswords, shortbows, and longbows.

traits.name: Fleet of Foot
traits.desc: Your base walking speed increases to 35 feet.

traits.name: Mask of the Wild
traits.desc: You can attempt to hide even when you are only lightly obscured by foliage, heavy rain, falling snow, mist, and other natural phenomena.

traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
traits.desc: You have proficiency with longswords, shortswords, shortbows, and longbows.

traits.name: Superior Darkvision
traits.desc: Your darkvision range increases to 120 feet.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.desc: You have disadvantage on attack rolls and on Perception checks relying on sight when you, the target of your attack, or whatever you are trying to perceive is in direct sunlight.

traits.name: Drow Magic
traits.desc: You know the Dancing Lights cantrip. At level 3 you can cast Faerie Fire once per Long Rest. At level 5 you can cast Darkness once per Long Rest. Charisma is your spellcasting ability.

traits.name: Drow Weapon Training
traits.desc: You have proficiency with rapiers, shortswords, and hand crossbows.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Gnomish Cunning
traits.desc: You have advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

traits.name: Natural Illusionist
traits.desc: You know the Minor Illusion cantrip. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for it.

traits.name: Speak with Small Beasts
traits.desc: Through sounds and gestures, you can communicate simple ideas with Small or smaller beasts.

traits.name: Artificer's Lore
traits.desc: Whenever you make a History check related to magic items, alchemical objects, or technological devices, you add twice your Proficiency Bonus to the roll.

traits.name: Tinker
traits.desc: You have proficiency with Artisan's Tools (Tinker's Tools). Using them you can spend 1 hour and 10 GP to construct a Tiny clockwork device (AC 5, 1 HP). The device can produce one of the following effects: Clockwork Toy, Fire Starter, or Music Box.

traits.name: Giant Ancestry
traits.desc: You are descended from giants. Choose one of the following benefits, which you can use once per Long Rest: Cloud's Jaunt (Misty Step as Bonus Action), Fire's Burn (deal extra 1d10 fire damage on hit), Frost's Chill (deal extra 1d6 cold damage and reduce Speed by 10 ft on hit, CON save to negate), Hill's Tumble (knock target prone on hit, STR save to negate), Stone's Endurance (Reaction: reduce damage taken by 1d12 + CON modifier), or Storm's Thunder (deal 1d8 thunder to attacker when hit, CON save to negate).

traits.name: Large Form
traits.desc: Starting at level 5, you can change your size to Large as a Bonus Action. This lasts for 10 minutes or until you end it (no action required). During that time, you have advantage on STR checks, your Speed increases by 10 feet, and you can carry, push, drag, and lift twice as much. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.desc: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

traits.name: Brave
traits.desc: You have advantage on saving throws against the Frightened condition.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.desc: You can move through the space of any creature of a size larger than yours.

traits.name: Lucky
traits.desc: When you roll a 1 on the d20 for an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.desc: You can attempt to hide even when you are obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.desc: You can attempt to hide even when you are obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.

traits.name: Stout Resilience
traits.desc: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance against poison damage.

traits.name: Resourceful
traits.desc: You gain Heroic Inspiration whenever you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Skillful
traits.desc: You gain proficiency in one skill of your choice.

traits.name: Versatile
traits.desc: You gain an Origin feat of your choice (see chapter 5 for feats with the Origin category).

traits.name: Adrenaline Rush
traits.desc: You can take the Dash action as a Bonus Action. When you do so, you gain Temporary Hit Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus. You can use this trait a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Short or Long Rest.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: You can see in dim light within 120 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.desc: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.desc: When you are reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 HP instead. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Fiendish Legacy
traits.desc: Choose one of the following legacies: Abyssal (Poison Spray cantrip; Hellish Rebuke at 3rd, Darkness at 5th), Chthonic (Chill Touch cantrip; Hex at 3rd, Hold Person at 5th), or Infernal (Fire Bolt cantrip; Hellish Rebuke at 3rd, Darkness at 5th). Charisma is your spellcasting ability.

traits.name: Otherworldly Presence
traits.desc: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.
